name: Linguine with Mushroom and Garlic Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy large skillet over medium-low heat.
2. Add mushrooms, garlic, rosemary, and a generous amount of pepper to the skillet.
3. Cook until the mushrooms release their juices, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes.
4. Add cream and simmer until the sauce thickens slightly, about 3 minutes. Season with salt.
5. Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water. Drain well.
6. Add the cooked pasta and cheese to the sauce and stir until the cheese melts.
7. Sprinkle with parsley and serve.
